case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS WONG, LAU SAM YU

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LAU SAM YU

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LAU SAM YU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, LAU SAM YU STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS THE ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
